## 14. 快速备忘

```bash
# 安装
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/colbymchenry/codegraph/main/install.sh | sh
npx @colbymchenry/codegraph
npm i -g @colbymchenry/codegraph

# 项目初始化
codegraph init -i

# 索引维护
codegraph index
codegraph index --force
codegraph sync
codegraph status

# 代码查询
codegraph query UserService
codegraph files --max-depth 3
codegraph context "fix login flow"
codegraph callers handleRequest
codegraph callees handleRequest
codegraph impact AuthMiddleware --depth 3

# 测试影响
git diff --name-only | codegraph affected --stdin

# MCP
codegraph serve --mcp

# 清理
codegraph uninstall --yes
codegraph uninit --force
```
